Title: Why enterprises need open source
Author: GitHub
Description:
"An awful lot of enterprises would not function without proper maintenance of open source projects." Anders Hejlsberg discusses the reality that open source is often more "take than give." He highlights the massive investment required to maintain tools like TypeScript and Visual Studio Code, which power the backends of countless companies.

#AndersHejlsberg #OpenSource #TypeScript
